meta.summary: Browser-based CELLxGENE server for interactive exploration and annotation of single-cell AnnData h5ad datasets.
meta.description: Browser-based CELLxGENE server for interactive exploration and annotation of single-cell AnnData h5ad datasets.

test: cellxgene --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'launch' >/dev/null && cellxgene launch --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Launch the cellxgene data viewer' >/dev/null && cellxgene prepare --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Preprocess data for use with cellxgene' >/dev/null && cellxgene-service --help | grep -F 'Usage: cellxgene-service' >/dev/null
python -c 'import anndata, gcsfs, louvain, numpy, pandas, pkg_resources, scanpy, scipy, s3fs, umap; print("ok")' | grep -Fx ok >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-cellxgene-prepare && cd /tmp/taf-cellxgene-prepare && python -c 'import anndata as ad, numpy as np, pandas as pd; X=np.random.default_rng(1).poisson(1, (40, 80)).astype("float32"); adata=ad.AnnData(X=X, obs=pd.DataFrame(index=[f"cell{i}" for i in range(40)]), var=pd.DataFrame(index=[f"gene{i}" for i in range(80)])); adata.write_h5ad("tiny.h5ad")' && cellxgene prepare --embedding umap --sparse --skip-qc -o tiny.prepared.h5ad tiny.h5ad >/tmp/taf-cellxgene-prepare.log 2>&1 && python -c 'import anndata as ad; a=ad.read_h5ad("tiny.prepared.h5ad", backed="r"); assert "X_umap" in a.obsm; print("ok")' | grep -Fx ok >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-cellxgene-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-cellxgene-smoke && python -c 'import anndata as ad, numpy as np, pandas as pd; X=np.array([[1,0,2],[0,1,3],[2,1,0]], dtype="float32"); obs=pd.DataFrame({"cell_type": pd.Categorical(["a", "b", "a"])}, index=["cell1", "cell2", "cell3"]); var=pd.DataFrame(index=["GeneA", "GeneB", "GeneC"]); adata=ad.AnnData(X=X, obs=obs, var=var); adata.obsm["X_umap"]=np.array([[0,0],[1,0],[0,1]], dtype="float32"); adata.write_h5ad("tiny.h5ad")' && (cellxgene-service --dataset tiny.h5ad > /tmp/taf-cellxgene-service.log 2>&1 & pid="$!"; ok=0; i=0; while [ "$i" -lt 60 ]; do if curl -fs http://127.0.0.1:5005/ >/dev/null 2>&1 && curl -fs -H 'Accept: application/octet-stream' 'http://127.0.0.1:5005/api/v0.2/layout/obs?layout-name=umap' >/dev/null 2>&1 && curl -fs -H 'Accept: application/octet-stream' 'http://127.0.0.1:5005/api/v0.2/annotations/obs?annotation-name=cell_type' >/dev/null 2>&1; then ok=1; break; fi; i=$((i + 1)); sleep 1; done; kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; grep -F 'http://127.0.0.1:5005/' /tmp/taf-cellxgene-service.log >/dev/null; test "$ok" -eq 1)

upstream.name: CELLxGENE
upstream.citation: Megill et al. 2021. cellxgene: a performant, scalable exploration platform for high dimensional sparse matrices.
